callings.label: The Merchant
callings.summary: Fortune through trade, credit, and the patient arbitrage of want — a line that buys low, holds, and launders coin into standing.

callings.label: The Scholar
callings.summary: Power rooted in learning and counsel — the family whose name is a school of thought, advising thrones it never sits.

callings.label: The Soldier
callings.summary: Authority taken and held by force of arms — a martial line that rises by conquest and is sanctified by its fallen.

callings.label: The Cleric
callings.summary: A dynasty of faith — the pulpit as the seat of power, souls as the constituency, and revival as the engine of the line.

callings.label: The Builder
callings.summary: First-principles makers — engineers, industrialists, and frontier-pushers who raise the new thing the age did not know it needed.

callings.label: The Courtier
callings.summary: Power by proximity — the family that whispers at the elbow of thrones, brokering marriages and outliving every regime it serves.
